---
title: "shiny truffle"
author: "Ian Hussey"
date: today
---

```{r}

# dependencies
#devtools::install_github("ianhussey/truffle")
library(truffle)

# needed by truffle
library(lavaan)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(tidyselect)
library(latent2likert)
library(ggplot2)
library(missMethods)

# variables to be in the shiny app inputs
project_identifier <- "student 1"
seed <- 42
design <- c("Cross sectional study", "Between 2 groups experiment") # this should be a dropdown
n <- 200
outcomes <- 3
items <- 10
response_options <- 7
alpha <- 0.70
r <- 0.5
d <- 0.5

# code to run in shiny app:
simulation_specifications <- tibble(
  project_identifier = project_identifier,
  seed = seed,
  design = design,
  n = n,
  outcomes = outcomes,
  items = items,
  response_options = response_options,
  alpha = alpha,
  r = r,
  d = d
) 

if(design=="Between 2 groups experiment"){
  # experiment
  data_clean <- 
    truffle_likert(study_design = "factorial_between2",
                   n_per_condition = n,
                   factors  = paste0("X", seq(from = 1, to = outcomes), "_latent"),
                   prefixes = paste0("X", seq(from = 1, to = outcomes), "_item"),
                   n_items = rep(items, outcomes),
                   n_levels = response_options,
                   alpha = rep(alpha, outcomes),
                   r_among_outcomes = r,
                   approx_d_between_groups = d,
                   seed = seed)
} else if(design=="Cross sectional study"){
  # cross-sectional study
  data_clean <- 
    truffle_likert(study_design = "crosssectional",
                   n_per_condition = n,
                   factors  = paste0("X", seq(from = 1, to = outcomes), "_latent"),
                   prefixes = paste0("X", seq(from = 1, to = outcomes), "_item"),
                   n_items = rep(items, outcomes),
                   n_levels = response_options,
                   alpha = rep(alpha, outcomes),
                   r_among_outcomes = r,
                   seed = seed) |>
    truffle_demographics()
}

data_untidy <- data_clean |>
  dirt_impossible_values(prop = .04, replacement_value = 8) |>
  # generate RT data and then add dirt
  mutate(completion_time = truffle_reaction_times(n = n())) |>
  dirt_numbers(cols = "completion_time", unit = " seconds") |>
  dirt_dates(col = "date") |>
  dirt_missingness(prop = .05) |>
  dirt_untidy(col = "block_trial") |>
  dirt_duplicates(prop = 0.05) |>
  # move some columns around before renaming makes it hard
  relocate(date, .after = "id") |>
  relocate(completion_time, .after = "id") |>
  relocate(block_trial, .after = "id") |>
  dirt_colnames()

# allow user to download a zip file named using the `project_identifier` variable (`project_identifier`.zip), containing three csv files created from:
simulation_specifications # ie simulation_specifications.csv 
data_untidy # ie data_untidy.csv 
data_clean # ie data_clean.csv 

```
